column_description: the unique identifier of the sanction screening record
the id of the customer being screened
the date when the screening was performed
the similarity score of the potential match
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
Score ranges from 0 to 100. Higher scores indicate stronger potential matches. Scores above 80 typically require manual review.

column_description: the name of the sanctions list matched against
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
Common lists: OFAC SDN, UN Sanctions, EU Sanctions, FATF Blacklist, Local Watchlists

column_description: the status of the match determination
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
Common statuses: Potential Match, Confirmed Match, False Positive, Under Review

column_description: the analyst who reviewed the screening result
value_description: Name or ID of the compliance officer

column_description: the date when the review was completed
value_description:
Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS
NULL if not yet reviewed
